titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 185: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 185. (A.R. No. 316 of 1910.) TIRUMEYJÑĀNAM, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall, central shrine, Jñānaparamēśvara temple.

It registers a sale of 1,290 kuḻi of and odd land inclusive of trees, well and water facilities after freeing that land from taxes, to the temple of Tirumayānattu Paramasvāmi at Nālūr, a brahmadēya in Śēṟṟūr-kūṟṟam by the peruṁguṟi-perumakkaḷ of the mahāsabhā of the village, which included the priests, (nambimār), for 13 paḻamaravu-kāśu received from the temple.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 371.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5 coṟṟūrkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam nālūr nampimāruḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaip peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom Ivvūr tirumayānattu paramasvāmi Iṭaik kācu koṇṭu viṟṟu
kuṭutta Iṟaiyili vilaiśrāvaṇaiyāvatu Ipparamasvāmikku yāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟu kuṭutta nilam niyāyanaṭaivāykkāliṉ vaṭakkiṟ pār yilum kiḻpāṟ kellaiy Ūroḻukaiyāṉa Oḻukkai
kku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai niyāyanaṭai vāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai sabhaiyom Ittirumayāṉatevarkku Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta lai sabhaiyom nilattukkum Oḻukkaikkum teṟkum
Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilu makappaṭṭa pārtti karuttaṉavāki māṭalaṉ pūtiāṅkimarāviṉpāti Āyirattirunūṟṟu toṇṇūṟṟuc ciṉṉam pārttiyilum ta lluṟaviṟ payaṉpāḻum kiṇaṟum kiṇaṟṟu nirum
Oṭṭic cantirātittaval Iṟai(i)ṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta kācu paḻamaravu kācu 10 3 Ikkācu patiṉmuṉṟuṅ koṇṭu cantirātittaval Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttom tirumayāṉattu paramasvāmikku .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 185 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
